courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Chrono Aperture
genericDescription: Design with extreme input constraint; create readable anticipation, action, and result states; tune difficulty through timing windows.
specificDescription: Build a game controlled by one button only. The player must learn a timing rule, fail safely, and improve within three attempts. Include three difficulty tiers and visual/audio feedback for early, perfect, and late input.
gradingRubric: 30 pts timing design and fairness; 20 pts clarity of feedback; 20 pts complete playable states; 15 pts tuning evidence from playtests; 15 pts designer's note and accessibility.
